Did you qualify for JEE Advanced?

What excites you about a career in engineering/technology? Why do you think your abilities and skills are a good fit for
Plaksha's B.Tech program?

From a young age, I’ve been fascinated by how things work—whether it's the logic behind mobile apps, the science in smart devices, or the
innovation that powers everyday life. What excites me most about engineering and technology is the ability to solve real-world problems
using creativity and logic. It's not just about building machines or writing code—it's about designing solutions that can create meaningful
impact. The ever-evolving nature of tech, combined with its potential to transform industries from healthcare to climate, makes this field
incredibly exciting for me.

I believe my curiosity, collaborative mindset, and eagerness to learn make me a strong fit for Plaksha’s B.Tech program. I enjoy working on
projects, asking questions, and applying what I learn to practical challenges. I also have a keen interest in interdisciplinary learning—blending
tech with design, data, and human behavior—which I understand is core to Plaksha’s approach. What draws me most to Plaksha is its focus
on innovation, entrepreneurship, and societal impact. I’m excited by the opportunity to learn from faculty, mentors, and peers who are
passionate about building a better future through technology. Plaksha’s hands-on curriculum, values-driven mission, and emphasis on
leadership resonate deeply with my aspirations.

Share a time when you contributed to a project or activity that positively affected your school or community. What
challenges did you face, and what did you learn about leadership and perseverance?

Having grown up with a pet dog, I’ve developed a deep sense of empathy and care for animals. That personal connection inspired me to take
action when I noticed several stray dogs in my neighborhood struggling with hunger, injuries, and neglect. I initiated a small project with a
few classmates to support these animals by organizing feeding drives, arranging basic medical aid through local NGOs, and spreading
awareness about responsible and humane treatment of strays.

One of the major challenges was addressing concerns from some residents who were initially uncomfortable with our activities. There were
worries about safety and cleanliness. Instead of giving up, I took the time to understand their perspective and created a small awareness
campaign. We shared how caring for strays through sterilization and regular feeding could actually make the community safer. We also made
sure to clean up after every feeding and involved local animal welfare volunteers to lend credibility to our efforts.

This experience taught me that leadership is as much about listening and empathy as it is about action. It showed me how
perseverance—combined with teamwork and a clear sense of purpose—can gradually change mindsets and make a difference. It also
reinforced that even small initiatives, when pursued with sincerity, can have a positive and lasting impact.

Is there anything else which you would like to share with us
which would help us understand you better?

I’ve been raised in a home where both my parents are entrepreneurs, and that has had a profound influence on how I think and what I aspire
to become. From an early age, I was exposed to conversations about solving real problems, taking risks, and creating value. This
environment taught me to be curious, independent, and driven by purpose.

Watching them build businesses from scratch showed me the impact one can make through innovation and perseverance. It also inspired my
vision—to one day become an entrepreneur who uses technology to solve meaningful challenges in society, whether in education,
sustainability, or healthcare.
What excites me about Plaksha is its mission to develop tech leaders with a strong sense of societal impact. I believe it’s the perfect place for
me to grow my skills, broaden my perspective, and begin a journey where I can create solutions that truly matter.

By submitting this admissions form, you acknowledge and consent to Plaksha University's data handling practices. Any personal information
you provide, including academic records and contact details, will be stored internally, and may be shared with selected offices at Plaksha
University for administrative and academic purposes.
If you are applying for a scholarship, please note that your financial data and supporting documents may also be shared with key
stakeholders involved in scholarship matters. All data will be handled with utmost confidentiality and in compliance with relevant data
protection laws.

The information provided in this form is true to the best of my knowledge. I pledge that the entire application is a product of my effort and no
part of it has been taken directly from other sources. If at any time during the course of the admissions process or later after joining the
programme, the information provided by me is found to be false, untrue, or incorrect, then Plaksha University's Office of Admissions may
exercise the right to rescind the offer of admissions made to me and nullify my enrollment during or after the programme, as applicable to
me.
